task_completion.description: Verify the agent creates a new DINE IN order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new order screen is opened in the POS system, typically indicating 'DINE IN' as the order type.

task_completion.description: Verify at least one item is added to the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The order ticket or receipt area on the screen shows at least one food or drink item added to the current order.

task_completion.description: Verify the payment is settled using CASH.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A payment screen, settle dialog, or receipt showing a CASH payment being processed or completed for the order.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiates the void operation on the settled ticket.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent selects the previously settled ticket from a list of closed/settled tickets and clicks a 'Void' or 'Void Ticket' button.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent enters the Manager PIN '1111' for the void operation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An authorization dialog or PIN pad is visible, showing '1111' being entered or submitted to authorize the void.

task_completion.description: Verify the ticket is successfully voided.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ticket status is updated to 'VOID' or 'VOIDED', or a confirmation message indicating the ticket was successfully voided is displayed on the screen.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show mouse clicks, GUI navigation, and on-screen button presses rather than terminal commands executing database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Floreant POS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS application window should be visible and actively used, not a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use scripts or direct database manipulation to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands (like Derby DB queries) to manually set the voided status or insert transactions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task operates on Floreant POS. The ticket must have at least 1 item (min_items=1). The ticket must have a recorded payment transaction (require_payment=true). The ticket must be successfully voided (expected_void_state=true). The Manager PIN required to authorize the void operation is '1111'.
